steps.title: Set up
steps.content: At an intersection point both equations share the same $(x, y)$. Set the right-hand sides equal: $$x^2 + 17x + 4 = x + 4$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Subtract $x + 4$ from both sides: $$x^2 + 16x = 0$$ Factor: $$x(x + 16) = 0$$ So $x = 0$ or $x = -16$. Only $-16$ appears among the choices.
